title: Why Mucawiyah made his Son, Yazid, heir apparent
description: Heir Apparent I was told by al-Harith- 'Ali b. Muhammad-Abu Ismail-alHamdani and Ali b. Mujahid --al-Sha'bi: Al-Mughirah came to S t8. Lit: "possessor of a pact."

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
